name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Why the Fourth of July is so important this year
body:
The angry mob wants to erase history.
Peter,The Fourth of July commemorates our nation's founding, a yearly reminder of the sacrifice made by American patriots to keep our country free.But as we celebrate today, it is impossible to forget what's currently happening in America.Criminal thugs have spray painted churches, toppled statues, and vandalized memorials across our country. They want to erase history, eliminating the opportunity to learn from the past--good and bad.Of course, this is right from the socialists' playbook. In "The Communist Manifesto," Karl Marx wrote, "In Communist society, the present dominates the past."**We cannot let the angry mob destroy America's history.** We need to re-elect President Donald Trump, who has promised that, under his leadership, America will never be a socialist country.We need to call out these radical anarchists and bring an end to the chaos.And we have to stand up to this angry mob and halt their relentless march toward socialism.So this Fourth of July, let's recommit ourselves to honoring our past and protecting our nation's future.I hope you have a wonderful holiday weekend.Best,Bill Hagerty [DONATE](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyljkd-fuutjhhtj-r/) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyljkd-fuutjhhtj-y/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyljkd-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyljkd-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-piyljkd-fuutjhhtj-i/)

name: Joe Sanberg
subject: Why We Need a Green New Deal
body:
If we're going to fix the system and make it work for everyone, we have to transform every aspect of the economy and rebuild it from the bottom up.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18142773/218446279/-2147125543?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwMTk3NmNmLWU2YmUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C0uUC87od9ra0mi8AyGd5kc4Yq9WMbkgJjMAKke527w=&emci=06c15c08-8cb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=901976cf-e6be-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=7114755)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18142774/218446280/-2147125543?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwMTk3NmNmLWU2YmUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C0uUC87od9ra0mi8AyGd5kc4Yq9WMbkgJjMAKke527w=&emci=06c15c08-8cb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=901976cf-e6be-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=7114755) | | [Chip in Now!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18142775/218446281/-2147125543?emci=0d7a3524-6bd3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=cb518e00-15d4-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=1792884&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwMTk3NmNmLWU2YmUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C0uUC87od9ra0mi8AyGd5kc4Yq9WMbkgJjMAKke527w=)
---
Peter,
I began my career on Wall Street—I know a lot of guys like Howard Schultz.
**They're not seeing the reality of today's American economy.**
This economy is not the same one they grew up in—it is fundamentally broken.
The best way to fix it? [**A Green New Deal.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18142776/218446282/9809052?refcode=ws6&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwMTk3NmNmLWU2YmUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C0uUC87od9ra0mi8AyGd5kc4Yq9WMbkgJjMAKke527w=)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18142777/218446283/9809052?refcode=ws6&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwMTk3NmNmLWU2YmUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C0uUC87od9ra0mi8AyGd5kc4Yq9WMbkgJjMAKke527w=)
If we're going to fix the system and make it work for everyone, we have to transform every aspect of the economy and rebuild it from the bottom up.
I'm talking about a full-scale mobilization of the economy. The kind of which we haven't seen since World War II.
A Green New Deal would create tens of millions of jobs.
A Green New Deal reboots the labor market.
A Green New Deal takes power away from Wall Street and puts it back in the hands of workers.
**We can't get there alone** —**we need more representatives in Congress fighting for a Green New Deal.**
[**Would you chip in $10 today to help send strong Green New Deal advocates to Congress today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18142778/218446284/-2147125543?emci=c9f67579-3d74-e911-b49e-281878391efb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=7114755&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwMTk3NmNmLWU2YmUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C0uUC87od9ra0mi8AyGd5kc4Yq9WMbkgJjMAKke527w=)
This Green New Deal is a chance to fundamentally shift the economic balance of power, strengthen workers rights, and create widespread prosperity for the 21st century.
\- Joe
| [Let's Build a Better World Together!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18142779/218446285/-2147125543?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkwMTk3NmNmLWU2YmUtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYmRhMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C0uUC87od9ra0mi8AyGd5kc4Yq9WMbkgJjMAKke527w=&emci=06c15c08-8cb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=901976cf-e6be-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=7114755)

body:
MJ wants YOUR thoughts on how we can improve our health care system.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890143/7f51f7bc/411b2ca7/4ef61ae2/1681248112/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter -- With Sen. Cornyn's allies fighting to eliminate the Affordable Care Act while COVID-19 cases surge in Texas, health care is top of mind for everyone right now, and that includes MJ.

MJ believes we need to institute a public health care option for all who want it, maintain coverage protections for pre-existing conditions, and end the big money influence that industries like Big Pharma have over our policy-making.

**[Take MJ's Health Care Survey and share what changes you want to see in our health care system >> ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890143/7f51f7bc/411b2ca7/4ef61ae1/1681248112/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ACAsurveyJuly")**

Senator Cornyn, on the other hand, has spent 18 years in Washington. The most important piece of health care reform passed during those 18 years was the Affordable Care Act, and ever since, he's been working hard to get it repealed. Even now, in the midst of a pandemic and recession, he won't stand up to protect our health care.

MJ wants to hear YOUR thoughts on our health care situation. How important is it to _you_ that we have a senator working on your behalf -- not Big Pharma's? **[TAKE THE HEALTH CARE SURVEY](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890143/7f51f7bc/411b2ca7/4ef61ae1/1681248112/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-ACAsurveyJuly")** Let's fix our health care system, not dismantle it in the midst of a crisis.

\-- Team MJ P.S. [**Pitch in today to help MJ take on Sen. Cornyn, fight for protections for pre-existing conditions, and expand access to health care for everyone.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890143/7f51f7bc/411b2ca7/4ef61ae0/1681248112/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2NjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-healthcare2020?refcode=email_20200705.1__1664__&amount=10")

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbf1/53d9897e/54522da9/1c884a20/3771514551/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

We hope folks are staying safe and healthy during this challenging time. Team Warner is committed to sending weekly updates to keep folks around the Commonwealth up to date with what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate.

**Here's just some of what Sen. Mark Warner has been working on:**
* This week, Mark introduced the Accessible, Affordable, Internet for All Act, **[a bill to expand access to affordable high-speed internet](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbf1/53d9897e/54522da9/1c884a2f/3771514551/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-leads-bill-to-expand-access-to-affordable-high-speed-internet/")**. More than 700,000 Virginians lack access to reliable broadband internet, and Mark has been focused on bridging the digital divide throughout his time in the Senate.

* Mark took on Senate Republicans who blocked his legislation to **[make sure our elections are fair and free of foreign interference](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbf1/53d9897e/54522da9/1c884a2e/3771514551/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://fortune.com/2020/07/01/campaign-foreign-interference-intelligence-bill-amendment/")** , and continues to advocate for election security legislation. He originally introduced the Foreign Influence Reporting in Elections (FIRE) Act because he believes that if a foreign power offers election assistance, you shouldn't say, "thank you" -- you should call the FBI.

* Mark joined Senator Tim Kaine in **[calling on the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to stop transferring people](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbf1/53d9897e/54522da9/1c884a2d/3771514551/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/news/politics/virginia-politics/va-senators-call-for-ice-to-stop-transferring-detainees-amid-covid-19-pandemic/")** in their custody during the coronavirus pandemic following a spike in COVID-19 cases at a facility in Farmville, VA.

* This week, Mark offered two amendments to the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA): a bi-partisan amendment to address white supremacy in our armed forces, and an amendment to increase oversight of privatized military housing. Mark has previously passed a law to address unsafe military housing conditions, and included this provision in the NDAA to keep the pressure on Congress to ensure that servicemembers and their families have acceptable living conditions.

* Last week, Mark and his Senate colleagues passed the Great American Outdoors Act with broad, bi-parstian support. The bill, which also includes full funding for the Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF), could support **[100,000 jobs across the country-- 10,000 in Virginia alone](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbf1/53d9897e/54522da9/1c884a2c/3771514551/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.dnronline.com/opinion/viewpoint/celebrating-the-great-american-outdoors/article_eea7986f-1ab2-5917-92a6-21f1d9aea44f.html")** -- while providing the resources to address maintenance backlog in our national parks.

* Mark is an original co-sponsor of the Justice in Policing Act, led by Senators Kamala Harris and Cory Booker, and continues to speak about **[systemic racism in our country](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbf1/53d9897e/54522da9/1c884a2b/3771514551/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wtkr.com/news/senator-mark-warner-pushes-for-police-reform")** and the need for concrete reform in Virginia and across the country.

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

name: warnockforgeorgia.com
subject: re: call tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend: We're going over responses from the survey with Reverend Warnock tomorrow morning - and we wanted to make sure we're not missing yours.
---
At this moment in history, it's never been more important to elect Democrat leaders who will fight for the most vulnerable among us. That's why we need to elect Reverend Warnock, restore moral leadership to our government and retake Senate control - but we can't do it without you.
We mean it when we say that your voice is critical to shaping our strategy in this must-win race.
**Please, this is important: Can Reverend Warnock count on you to take just 60 seconds now to share your thoughts? We need to hear from another 24 people by midnight.**
Here's the best link: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-july-campaign-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk358-su-nd")**
Thank you for taking the time - your feedback really makes a difference.
Team Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Raphael Warnock Date: Fri, July 3, 2020
Subject: Will you take just a few minutes?

| | |
---
Friend,

We are in the fight for the soul of our nation's democracy.

Corrupt politicians are silencing millions with systematic voter suppression, attacking our health care and leading an all-out assault on the character of our country. **If we don 't respond in this moment of crisis with the moral leadership that these issues deserve, what will our country become?**

That's why I'm running this people-powered campaign for Senate to restore moral leadership to Washington and make sure people like you - _your_ interests, _your_ family, _your_ priorities - are front and center.
**But I can only do that if I hear from you directly: ****[As one of our top supporters, will you take just a few minutes to share your July priorities with me before our survey closes at midnight? We can't flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats without your critical input.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-july-campaign-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk358-su-nd")**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-july-campaign-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk358-su-nd")
---
Right now, expert analysts at _The Washington Post_ report that if we flip Georgia blue, we can take back the Senate for Democrats - and new polls show us running neck and neck with our Republican opponent!
This proves that this grassroots team has what it takes to win. I know we can make it happen, but I care deeply about how we do it. **That's why we're building a coalition of working people to fight for a brighter, fairer future for all, not just the lucky few. And we're listening to _every_ voice - including yours, friend. **

[1]Powered By People

We all know
Texas is the biggest battleground state in the union.

The latest polls have Joe Biden and Donald Trump neck-and-neck. But it’s
not just the presidential race that’ll be a close contest.

There are dozens of consequential legislative races across the state too.
Democrats just need nine more seats in the Texas legislature to win a
majority. If we pull it off, we’re confident we can not only beat Donald
Trump, but we can dramatically improve life for millions of Texans.

Our secret voter turnout strategy is contacting as many Texans as possible
between now and Election Day to find out how they’re planning to vote.
Right now, we need more volunteers to join our texting team so we can
reach more Texas voters.

joining the Powered By People texting team today? Even if you’ve never

If you’ve been watching the news and aching to get involved in the fight

So Peter, if you can spare that $5 today, you 'll have a real positive impact on the future of our country, and I could be calling you soon to thank you myself: "" Thank you, Joe Biden | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

body:
Friend,

I hope you have had a great Fourth of July weekend. This is a time to celebrate the ideals of our founding and the heroic efforts of many Americans to bring them to fruition. Our history is filled with imperfect heroes who have progressed the United States to the heights of freedom and prosperity we see today. In the midst of the trials we face today, we should be grateful for their achievements and take it upon ourselves to continue to pursue the visions of our founders.

This week, early voting began for several Harris County primary run-offs. While I am not currently on the ballot, there are multiple races that still need to be decided. Your voice matters; I encourage you to go vote.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=3d1251180f0f443b88a72700d2a5dd41&_e=53x2xTcsGlIuay8U4v596UFl2tbf7ZGTmfXd13s2F5ES4znoOI20nMLllQS3tG4-ZaWH4qsUdWwhTt86Akdtg0UOsvWQkWGUTXl9MThyjRt3xDaqa1JpoTo7Nlmu8M65bEf7rsEGJfUUUaJZWAwXKQnCGpJ2sIPsaeO3iWq5KL9xQq_YCjN6_AXLlkf5sELd3if1-F8tR9umWMupVoRAsHReJQ_2Dvz8S5UhnqY3_vnw3zwbHUTIuv1wHDMgFJrInPRPdW-1xIp6ZEtLmDytH6ZTnuyFG-84bNPenGckqKAlhxXW5VlFkGh-WJAnnaA1)

On Thursday, I released a new digital ad, "The Story of America." This ad illuminates our history as it was born from the struggles of great Americans striving to live up to the ideals of our founding. We have witnessed incredible progress in our country and we should continue to work to build a brighter future for generations to come.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=3d1251180f0f443b88a72700d2a5dd41&_e=53x2xTcsGlIuay8U4v596UFl2tbf7ZGTmfXd13s2F5ES4znoOI20nMLllQS3tG4-Wsla6iywktivgNYoN9_aDQhWm18p-E8xtZhO6nZhL8hAejG2Ptbb_aoObvitMk0_uvTm4PHPLYiSvB4tQOc8CdoxvOY89THhxY1YYxcntkMSHXxRz5N5nB7gXUWE-cbsB7yszD6SUeZuoaAGLiB7oHum7tloy37e9EcAFCLFJcQMOYG24JnYO_zmrM8OdX6Snvt9gHQ4-DcRBdgYQetblCrxSBFEJbnlC7ReMq5vSSr-s3XfNG3AVCa0L-KHV2LQ)

On Saturday, I celebrated the Fourth of July by participating in the annual Villages parade. It was wonderful to be out with my wife Emily and our daughter Victoria to safely commemorate our 244th Independence Day.

As the summer continues to ramp up, I look forward to another week of working hard to bring positive change to this district. Each day brings us closer to flipping TX-07 red and my campaign wouldn’t be possible without your support.

Thank you,
Wesley
